🌓 | Beep Beep Beep goes the bracelet

Your boyfriend, Devaughn, got you two bracelets a while back - one gold with a moon button on it, and the other black with a sun button on it. When you press the symbol on one, the other symbol beeps. And, well, Devaughn's bracelet *won't* stop beeping. Now he's worried.
